title: Goety Event Horizon
description: Goety Event Horizon (formerly Goety End Biomes) is a mod that aims to expand upon Goety's End Update by adding new Biomes and Enemies inspired by Minecraft Dungeons to the End.
body:
![Goety Event Horizon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/46620089f2d2e0f54a95e6b6424e60d60d150c82.png) **Goety Event Horizon** (formerly Goety End Biomes) is a mod that aims to expand upon **Goety**'s End Update by adding new Biomes and Enemies inspired by **Minecraft Dungeons** to the End. Adventure into the outer end islands and discover the 2 new biomes! **The Chorus Forest** ![Chorus Forest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/395818c97fa2010c13188ba4296830772979bdfe_0.webp) The End Wilds ![End Wilds](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/784833c00275b298d20776aecd4f87639acf25d8_0.webp) Avoid or Defeat the wild Enderlings! ![Enderlings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/30dcf394c39dca5c8f68b71ddaebf1cad7bb89c8_0.webp) This mods requires Goety and Blueprint API. **Credits:** **boxknight** - Assisted in creating structures for some of the features
**Polarice3** - Author of the original mod, Goety
**Mojang** - creators of Minecraft Dungeons
